patterns_recognized: Extreme positive edge (>20pp) = model overconfidence, not real edge: May 8 SEA@CHW (+31pp edge, SEA won 12-8) and NYM@ARI (+23pp, lost 1-3); today SEA@CHW again at +24.65pp with model at 68% vs market 43% — identical failure signature.

Negative-edge GOLD picks must be downgraded: 05-09 validated — CHC@TEX (-4.41pp, lost 0-6) and NYY@MIL (-2.00pp, lost 3-4) both GOLD-confirmed at negative edge, both lost. Today TB@BOS is GOLD with edge -0.75pp.
PLATINUM tier historically ~43% hit rate (heuristic 4); COL@PHI appears PLATINUM for a third consecutive slate day without fair_prob, with base p_model only 52.1% — same recurring structural concern.

Stage 1/2 gap >20pp without F2_xwoba >= 0.025 signals unreliable bullpen-carry thesis; CHC@TEX has 22.9pp gap (f5=0.698 vs full=0.469) with F2=0.023 just below the exception threshold, plus confidence_downgrade=True.

Stacked pipeline flags (confidence_downgrade=True + bullpen_fatigue=True) on GOLD picks reliably signal DOWNGRADE; pattern validated on 05-09 (DET@KC, COL@PHI both correct downgrades with stacked flags).

WSH @ MIA.reasoning: Edge -5.95pp outside [4,15] band; SKIP tier applied. Calibrated rate for the 0.5-0.6 bin is 47.8% — directional picks here win slightly less than half the time. No signals fire, no stress warnings. fair_prob=0.5693 confirms MIA is a genuine market favorite. Calibrator and model agree on direction; no basis to override the SKIP classification.

OAK @ BAL.reasoning: SKIP tier; edge +6.27pp within band but grader pre-assigned SKIP. Both f5_prob=0.480 and full_prob=0.437 for OAK are below 50%, yet p_model=0.563 — stage outputs and blended model internally disagree. Market is 50/50 (fair_prob=0.50). On 05-09 OAK won 6-2 at SKIP; today's structure is similar with no escalating flags.

TB @ BOS.reasoning: GOLD with edge -0.75pp (negative). Per 05-09 validated pattern: negative-edge GOLD picks failed 0-for-2 (CHC@TEX -4.41pp lost 0-6; NYY@MIL -2.00pp lost 3-4). Market prices BOS slightly above the model (fair_prob=0.5508 vs model 0.5433) — market holds SP-day information the model doesn't. confidence_downgrade=True internally set. DOWNGRADE to SKIP.

COL @ PHI.reasoning: PLATINUM historically hits ~43% (heuristic 4). No fair_prob available (fetched_capped) makes edge unverifiable. Base p_model=52.1% is coin-flip territory despite PLATINUM classification. F1_xera_gap=3.99 and F3=772.9 fire but without a market edge anchor the signals cannot be trusted. Third consecutive slate appearance of this matchup at PLATINUM with no fair_prob. DOWNGRADE to SKIP.

LAA @ TOR.reasoning: SKIP tier pre-assigned despite edge +10.94pp being within band. Calibrated 0.6743 → ~57.97% (0.6-0.7 bin); market fair_prob=0.5649 is already close to calibrated real rate, so edge is thinner than raw model suggests. On 05-09 TOR demolished LAA 14-1 at SKIP — direction correct, staking correctly excluded. No new information to escalate beyond SKIP.

HOU @ CIN.reasoning: SKIP with acute_roster warning and confidence_downgrade=True. Stage 1/2 gap: f5_prob=0.350 (CIN dominates F5) vs p_model=0.538 — an 18.8pp gap exceeding heuristic 5 threshold, meaning HOU's full-game thesis requires a bullpen reversal of CIN's starter dominance. On 05-09 that reversal failed (CIN won 3-1). Calibrated to below 50%. SKIP confirmed.

MIN @ CLE.reasoning: GOLD with four concurrent risk factors: (1) F3_swing_take_gap=16.1 is an extremely weak signal (vs. ATL@LAD's 1774.2); (2) bullpen_fatigue=True yet the full-game thesis depends on a 10.7pp Stage 1/2 gap (f5=0.547 vs full=0.654); (3) confidence_downgrade=True internally; (4) heuristic 1: home favorite at 65.4%, above 65% threshold. Edge barely in-band at +4.08pp. DOWNGRADE to SKIP.

SEA @ CHW.reasoning: Edge +24.65pp is catastrophically outside [4,15] band, matching the May 8 failure pattern exactly (CHW +31pp edge, model 74% vs market 45% — SEA won 12-8). Today: model 68.03% vs fair_prob 43.38% for CHW — a 24.65pp model-market gap. Cannot verify SP matchup to build a directional OVERRIDE thesis; DOWNGRADE to SKIP while preserving directional agnosticism. Staking already zero by band filter.

NYY @ MIL.reasoning: Carlos Rodón has 0 Statcast pitches season-to-date — SP-edge score impossible. NYY has lost two consecutive games in this series (05-08: 0-6 to rookie Misiorowski; 05-09: 3-4 in close game) while Vegas slightly favored MIL both days. Without Rodón's SP-quality score, any NYY directional call is unanchored. PENDING is correct; no pick is the right call.

CHC @ TEX.reasoning: GOLD with 22.9pp Stage 1/2 gap (f5=0.698 vs full=0.469 for CHC): Stage 1 strongly favors CHC in F5, but Stage 2 says TEX wins the full game at 53.1%. p_model=53.1% calibrates to 47.8% (0.5-0.6 bin) — below 50%. F2_xwoba=0.023 misses the 0.025 exception threshold by 0.002. confidence_downgrade=True also fired. DOWNGRADE to SKIP.

PIT @ SF.reasoning: Stage 1/2 gap is 24.1pp (f5=0.668 vs full=0.427 for PIT), but F2_xwoba=0.032 exceeds 0.025 threshold — exactly when the 05-09 exception applies: 'when gap >20pp AND F2 >= 0.025, lineup may dominate early.' SF is 15-24 (worst record on slate). No bullpen_fatigue or confidence_downgrade flags. On 05-09 PIT dominated SF 13-3 with same structure. GOLD confirmed.

NYM @ ARI.reasoning: Edge +2.91pp barely in-band but SKIP. Calibrated rate for 0.5-0.6 bin is 47.8% — below 50% directional expectation. bullpen_fatigue=True and confidence_downgrade=True both flagged. On 05-08 ARI lost at 68% raw; on 05-09 ARI won narrowly 2-1 — alternating with no reliable trend. SKIP is the correct designation.

STL @ SD.reasoning: Largest Stage 1/2 gap on the slate: f5=0.776 vs full=0.442 for STL (gap=0.334). STL's full-game thesis requires a complete bullpen collapse by SD — no F-signals fire to support this. Calibrated 0.5583 → 47.8% in the 0.5-0.6 bin. On 05-09 STL lost 2-4. This matchup has no reliable directional signal; SKIP prevents exposure.

ATL @ LAD.reasoning: F3_swing_take_gap=1774.2 is the strongest SP-independent lineup signal on the slate; Stage 1/2 gap is minimal (5.8pp). Calibrated 65.03% → ~57.97%; fair_prob=0.5606 leaves ~2pp real edge — thin but positive. bullpen_fatigue and confidence_downgrade fire (one stacked flag, not two); heuristic 1 exception applies ('strong supporting signal' in F3). On 05-08 same matchup LAD won 3-1. GOLD confirmed.

DET @ KC.reasoning: Brenan Hanifee has 0 Statcast pitches season-to-date — SP-edge score impossible. Both starters appear to be limited-data arms, making the SP differential feature unreliable in both directions. No reliable pick can be generated; PENDING designation is correct.
